sourceRef.citation: Kourovka Notebook, Problem 19.11 (Khukhro & Mazurov eds., ed.19)

statement.latex: Does there exist a constant$c$such that the number of conjugacy classes in a finite group$G$is always at least$c _2 |G|$? Editors' comment of 2021: It is proved that every group$G$contains at least$|G|/( |G|)^8$conjugacy classes for some fixed$> 0$(L.\,Pyber, , 46, no.\,2 (1992), 239--249). It is also proved that for every$> 0$there exists$> 0$such that every finite group$G$of order at least 3 has...
